title: Dataset for study of RNA and DNA tetraloop hairpin formation
author: Ke, Yong-Qi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
1.‘gamd’ represents the gamd trajectories of the RNA UUCG, DNA UUCG, RNA UACG, RNA UCCG, RNA UGCG, RNA UUCA, and RNA CUCG systems mentioned in the article。 
 2.‘msm’ represents the equilibrium dynamics trajectories of the Markov models used for the RNA UUCG and DNA UUCG systems in the article. 
 3.‘metadynamics’ represents the metadynamics trajectories of the RNA UUUU system mentioned in the article. 
 4.‘cmd’ represents the equilibrium dynamics trajectory simulations of the RNA UUUU system obtained after mutating state 8 of RNA UUCG to RNA UUUU, as described in the article.
steps_raw:
1.‘gamd’ represents the gamd trajectories of the RNA UUCG, DNA UUCG, RNA UACG, RNA UCCG, RNA UGCG, RNA UUCA, and RNA CUCG systems mentioned in the article。 
 2.‘msm’ represents the equilibrium dynamics trajectories of the Markov models used for the RNA UUCG and DNA UUCG systems in the article. 
 3.‘metadynamics’ represents the metadynamics trajectories of the RNA UUUU system mentioned in the article. 
 4.‘cmd’ represents the equilibrium dynamics trajectory simulations of the RNA UUUU system obtained after mutating state 8 of RNA UUCG to RNA UUUU, as described in the article.
